drafts.x:
S&P 500 pushing higher while the rest of the board is watching.
Needs oil to break the range — only then does it matter.

SPX 7,574. 10Y 4.51%. Oil $94.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,688 or below 7,461
• 10Y moves beyond 4.71% or below 4.31%

What breaks this range — and which direction?

REGIME: Transitional | From restrictive
CONFIDENCE: High (71/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Stable

Snapshot — Jun 01, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,574.19   z +1.59
  10Y Yield:      4.512%  z +1.26
  WTI Oil:        94.39   z -0.22

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,574 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.51% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $94 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,688 or below 7,461
• 10Y moves beyond 4.71% or below 4.31%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
